property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: testLogging
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-07 23:03:41 [main] INFO TransactionService - B?t ??u x? l? giao d?ch cho tài kho?n: ACC_9999, S? ti?n: 500000.0 2026-05-07 23:03:41 [main] INFO TransactionService - Giao d?ch thành công cho tài kho?n: ACC_9999 2026-05-07 23:03:41 [main] INFO TransactionService - B?t ??u x? l? giao d?ch cho tài kho?n: ACC_ERROR, S? ti?n: -100.0 2026-05-07 23:03:41 [main] ERROR TransactionService - Giao d?ch th?t b?i cho tài kho?n: ACC_ERROR.
